---
title: "Benthic Ecology"
page-layout: full
toc: true
---

# 

<!-- ![](images/benthic_banner.jpg){width=100%} -->

---

# Overview

During my Master's research, I investigated the ecology of Arctic deep-sea benthic ecosystems, focusing on methane cold seeps along the Norwegian continental margin and the Barents Sea. My work combined remotely operated vehicle (ROV) surveys, GIS-based image analyses, sediment geochemistry and benthic ecology to understand how hydrocarbon seepage shapes biodiversity and ecosystem functioning in polar marine environments.

This research resulted in two peer-reviewed publications and laid the foundation for my later work in Arctic microbial ecology.


---

# Publications

## Paper 1 — Published

### [Sen *et al.* (2019)](https://doi.org/10.1038/s41598-018-38070-9)

### Research summary

This study characterized a newly discovered Arctic methane cold seep using ROV imagery, GIS mapping, sediment geochemistry and benthic community analyses.

### Key findings

- Characterized a previously unknown Arctic methane cold seep ecosystem.
- Recorded the first evidence of frenulate siboglinid worms colonizing hard carbonate substrates.
- Identified the seep as a probable nursery ground for Arctic skate egg cases.
- Demonstrated how sulphide-rich seep environments structure Arctic benthic communities.


---

## Paper 2 — Published

### [Sen *et al.* (2019)](https://doi.org/10.7717/peerj.7398)

### Research summary

This study compared benthic communities at an Arctic methane seep with the surrounding background seafloor using high-resolution image mosaics.

### Key findings

- Weak hydrocarbon seepage significantly increased megabenthic diversity and abundance.
- Carbonate crusts acted as biodiversity hotspots by providing habitat for benthic organisms.
- Ecological effects of seep habitats persist even after seep activity declines.
- The findings have important implications for Arctic marine conservation and offshore resource management.


---


# Gallery

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column}

![](images/field8.jpg){.benthic-photo}

:::

::: {.column}

![](images/field9.jpg){.benthic-photo}

:::

::::

<br>

<div class="benthic-single">

::: {.benthic-card}

![](images/field10.jpg){.benthic-photo}

:::

</div>

---

# Keywords

- Deep-sea ecology
- Cold seeps
- ArcGIS - Spatial mapping
- ROV surveys
- Sediment geochemistry
